feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: why do italians love to steal other people's belongings?
entry.content: many people who have traveled to italy say they were pickpocketed is it legal there o algo?

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General #8349 Fagatoro Edition Previous Thread: >>83777885 F-list…
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8349 Fagatoro Edition Previous Thread: >>83777885 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >a scuba diver look for his father's remains is swalled by a whale and has an ho…
entry.content: >a scuba diver look for his father's remains is swalled by a whale and has an hour to figure out how to escape What the fuck is this random movie? And how did they get Josh Brolin? Wasn't he in mega billion dollar Marvel movies? I thought it was a joke trailer when Youtube suggested it but it is real and the whole trailer is just the scene of how he gets eaten by the whale during some whale vs giant squid fight. I guess putting the only interesting scene in the trailer. Does Hollywood just make

entry.title: /int/ International: This evening I met a Pakistani guy at the mall. He is tall, skinny and pale. He …
entry.content: This evening I met a Pakistani guy at the mall. He is tall, skinny and pale. He doesn't look Pakistani at all. I thought he was Syrian. He speak English without the annoying South Asian "accent".

entry.title: /b/ Random: I hate my fetish and I don't know how to live with it
entry.content: I'm putting this out here so I can get it into words and hopefully get some input from people who know what the hell's going on. I get a boner from the thought of men transforming into women. Gonna get gross and personal. Scroll on if that bothers you. >be me, male child with unsupervised internet access >browsing youtube, find comic of either mario or sonic character being turned female; don't remember which >think idly from time to time about other fictional characters genderbent. I remember m

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: This game is unironicaly worse than Code Veronica. You get absurd amounts of amm…
entry.content: This game is unironicaly worse than Code Veronica. You get absurd amounts of ammo and healing so you can just kill every enemy as soon as you see them instead of having to weigh your options of using precious resources or risking taking damage. This is also reinforced by instead of having 3 zombies in a hallway, letting the player avoid them if they play well you get 10 of them creating a wall that you have to kill if you don't want to die. The RPD is said to be one of the greatest locations in

entry.title: /g/ Technology: PSA disable or downgrade Imagus Reborn
entry.content: If you've been having issues with 4chan taking an extra long time to load with 4chan XT installed, the latest version of Imagus Reborn is what's causing it. I had to figure this out the hard way after reconfiguring my OpenWRT router and trying several browsers just to realize that all of them had Imagus Reborn installed. It's such a useful extension I never realized it could be causing this.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: moc3 to cmo3 file converter
entry.content: https://codeberg.org/Podimium/Quadr ism The conversion passes `hash(moc3) == hash(moc3 -> cmo3 -> moc3)` byte-level equivalency for most of moc3 (i.e alp3) and cmo3 (i.e omg3) models I got a hand on. If you knows moc3ingbird exploit, you'll knows what moc3 being used for. Also have basic support for json -> can3 (i.e chi3) conversion. I'm going to be upfront that this is pretty much vibecoded. Overall agentic dev time span across a month (since discussion regarding cmo3 on X) so there's that.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Humanz is better than I remember it being. It's pretty good, but not a good Gori…
entry.content: Humanz is better than I remember it being. It's pretty good, but not a good Gorillaz album. It has a great vibe and atmosphere. It has a lot of good singles, but way too many features. We Got the Power is still one of the worst closing tracks of any Gorillaz album.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >I am not crazy! I know they swapped those numbers! I knew it was 1225. One afte…
entry.content: >I am not crazy! I know they swapped those numbers! I knew it was 1225. One after Christmas Eve. As if I could ever make such a mistake. Never. Never! I just - I just couldn't prove it. The - the culprit must have covered their tracks, they got that priest at the church to lie for them. You think this is something? You think this is insane? This? This conspiracy? They've done worse. That forest! Are you telling me that dess just happenened to dissapear mere minutes of going in there? No! They or

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: >In the interview, the actor says Scott’s loose approach on the ‘Dog Stars’ set …
entry.content: >In the interview, the actor says Scott’s loose approach on the ‘Dog Stars’ set immediately threw him off. Brolin said, “it bugged me out, and I got really scared.” >That discomfort escalated quickly into full panic. After just his first day, he left set and called his agent, convinced something was fundamentally wrong. In that moment, he said, “I want out. Something’s really wrong, and I’ve got to get the fuck out of here.” Ridley fatigue lol

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Are there any charts or RYM lists for good walking music? Ideally something with…
entry.content: Are there any charts or RYM lists for good walking music? Ideally something with a bit of a beat that would be suitable as background music for an indie film. Pic a very good example, and I'm actually going through an RYM list of jangle pop albums right now. Problem is, once I use an album for a few days of walks and bus rides, it loses it's luster, and I have to find something new.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Don’t want a computer on wheels, I want analog not digital dashboard. I’m either…
entry.content: Don’t want a computer on wheels, I want analog not digital dashboard. I’m either between a gen 2 tundra crew max or a 2008-2020 Sequoia. Slurped a 2012 Lexus rx 350 with only 60k miles in pristine condition late last year. Need to secure my other vehicle that I hope will last forever and I don’t have to think about electronic zog slop/sensors for repairs/tracking/remote kill switch. Open to other suggestions. 2 children under 2.5. The reo coming next year seems enticing but unsure if I want to w

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Best or worst time to get into tech?
entry.content: I keep hearing all the doom and gloom about not only AI but all the entry-level job fuckery. Despite this all the automation makes it feel like it's more important to understand how these things work, not less, at the level of actual agency. But I don't want to be at the mercy of a capricious job market or a fucked up tech culture either. Haven't lurked here for a few years, was going to get a CS degree but decided it was a bubble so fucked off elsewhere ~2019. But now I'm mastering out of an un

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Hate music for some reason
entry.content: Its an irritant its a noise polluter. And its just entertainment its just something to tickle the brain while you work a 9 to 5 or go shopping in a supermarket. Or maybe go to a concert or a show but then its the same impulse as switching on Netflix. Its all pointless. I used to love music but I can't stand it all I want to hear is silence.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: KIDS Act
entry.content: Why isn't 4chan administration making a bigger deal about this? Senate is out for a two-week recess before they pass this bill. This would force the non-blue boards to require age verification for access, namely buying the 4chan pass with a credit card as a way to verify... Oh.

entry.title: /news/ News: Supreme Court ruling allows states to ban trans athletes from female sports
entry.content: https://www.usatoday.com/story/news /politics/2026/06/30/supreme-court- transgender-female-athlete-bans-tea ms/88629310007/ WASHINGTON – States can ban transgender women and girls from competing on female sports teams, the Supreme Court ruled June 30 in addressing a major cultural and political flashpoint before adjourning for the summer. The decision is another setback in a series of recent rulings affecting transgender Americans that the high court has handed to the LGBTQ+ community. The court
